text:
Prediction: Yes

The current visit record explicitly mentions "Pure hypercholesterolemia" as one of the diagnoses. This indicates that the patient has a diagnosed lipid disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given this clear evidence of an existing lipid disorder, it is reasonable to predict that this diagnosis will be coded again in the patient's next hospital visit, especially since it is an actively managed condition as indicated by the prescription of Atorvastatin, a medication commonly used to treat hypercholesterolemia. Therefore, the presence of this diagnosis in the current visit strongly supports the likelihood of it being recorded again in the future.
